Content: I will write a script to search the conversation transcript and extract the complete output of the deletion step. This will reveal the exact products, their IDs, and potentially more details printed during deletion.
Tool Calls: [
  {
    "name": "write_to_file",
    "args": {
      "CodeContent": "\"const fs = require('fs');\\nconst readline = require('readline');\\nconst path = require('path');\\n\\nconst logPath = '/Users/sahilpatel/.gemini/antigravity-ide/brain/95c2cdb5-9f4e-4753-9387-e792c2ce401a/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl';\\n\\nasync function run() {\\n  const fileStream = fs.createReadStream(logPath);\\n  const rl = readline.createInterface({\\n    input: fileStream,\\n    crlfDelay: Infinity\\n  });\\n\\n  for await (const line of rl) {\\n    if (line.includes('delete_hardcoded_products.cjs') || line.includes('Found 28 products to delete')) {\\n      const parsed = JSON.parse(line);\\n      console.log('--- FOUND MATCH ---');\\n      console.log('Step Index:', parsed.step_index);\\n      console.log('Type:', parsed.type);\\n      console.log('Content:', parsed.content);\\n      if (parsed.tool_calls) {\\n        console.log('Tool Calls:', JSON.stringify(parsed.tool_calls, null, 2));\\n      }\\n      // If there is output from running the command:\\n      // It might be in a separate step of type \\\"TOOL_OUTPUT\\\" or similar\\n    }\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nrun();\\n\"",
      "Description": "\"Create scratch/extract_transcript.cjs to extract deletion details\"",
      "IsArtifact": "false",
      "Overwrite": "true",
      "TargetFile": "\"/Applications/Store/Store/scratch/extract_transcript.cjs\"",
      "toolAction": "\"Creating scratch/extract_transcript.cjs\"",
      "toolSummary": "\"Writing node script\""
    }
  }
]
